task: Advanced high-value task: Iam Attack Path Graph Decision Rule Calibration. Scenario: a governance team wants a reproducible analysis that another reviewer can rerun from the row data alone for iam attack path graph. Embedded packet: Records: R1 admin_edges=22 public_triggers=45 PII_reachable=7; R2 admin_edges=31 public_triggers=41 PII_reachable=10; R3 admin_edges=17 public_triggers=56 PII_reachable=6. Remediation options: O1 changes admin_edges by -12% cost=66500; O2 changes public_triggers by -18% cost=87300; O3 changes PII_reachable by -25% cost=48700; max_budget=111600. Rules and constraints: public trigger reaching PII or admin edge without MFA is critical; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: quantify the operational consequence of each exception and rank follow-up actions by urgency and evidentiary strength. Deliver IAM_attack_path_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
